DESCRIPTION: Cards using spears
Take damage equal to stacks when attacking. Reduce 1 stack at end of turn if no attack was made.
Gain 1 when executing non-minion enemies (extra 1 per 30 max HP of target). #yAll max HP gains become fullness gains.
When HP reaches 0, if karma ≠1, revive with full HP and reduce karma by 1.
This hibernation costs no fullness and grants no karma. After trigger, next hibernation in combat requires 10 fullness and cannot be forced.
Every 10 stacks: gain 1 buffer and 1 dexterity.
Scavenger's treasures.
Gain 1 fullness when be damaged by Slug Cat.
Draw 1 less card per turn, gain 1 less energy.
Gain 1 extra energy per turn. Cannot gain karma. Cannot be removed.
Your karma decreases by 1 per turn. Cannot be removed.
Gain equal stacks of #yintangible , reduce cost of powers/skills by 1. Next attack deals double damage, then end lurking and lose equal intangible.
Next turn put a blue fruit in hand.
Next turn draw extra counter cards, gain 3x counter block. Playing cards increases counter.
When playing next card, if identical card in hand/draw pile, exhaust it and automatically play all identical cards.
Next revival won't reduce karma (even at karma 0).
Next spear card played costs 0.
Only one copy takes effect even if multiple in deck.
Vulture's Aid: NL Gain flight. NL Lizard's Aid: NL Destroy block, deal damage. NL Scavenger's Aid: NL Gain gold.
After gaining this, when playing a card not recorded before (upgraded/unupgraded share name), record it and gain #yfullness .
Playing a #ycorrupted card grants #ycorruption_value . When #ycorruption_value reaches #b5 , enter #yRottification state.
When played, gain 1 stack of #ycorruption_value . (Only effective for Rain World Hunter).

When #ycorruption_value reaches #b5 , enter #yRottification state. For each #ycorrupted card in the exhausted pile, gain #b1 stack of #ycorruption_power . Cannot revive via #ykarma while in #yRottification state.
Return this card from the discard pile to your hand (only effective for non-exhausted attack/skill cards).
If this card is #ycorrupted , select un-#ycorrupted cards; otherwise, select all #ycorrupted cards.
Cannot be #ycorrupted . Gain [E] when drawn; if in #yRottification state, #rlose [E] instead.
While in #yRottification state, increase damage dealt by attacks. #rlose all corruption_strength when exiting #yRottification state.

Enemies with HP lower than the number of devour stacks die instantly. Enemies with devour gain 1 stack of #yentanglement each turn. (Clear all devour stacks of enemies when exiting #yRottification state.)
Effect triggered when karma decreases during combat.
